children.heading: Regulations
children.label: a Regulations
children.text: All regulations promulgated under this chapter prior to , shall remain in effect until superseding regulations are promulgated under .October 2, 1996section 2405 of this title

children.heading: Permits
children.label: b Permits
children.text: All permits issued under this chapter shall remain in effect until they expire in accordance with the terms of those permits.
